name: No one saw me fall from ladder at work, does that kill my claim?

mainEntity.name: No one saw me fall from ladder at work, does that kill my claim?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, your testimony plus medical evidence suffices**.[4]

Circumstantial proof like ladder position, injuries consistent with fall.[1]

- Photos of scene.
- Supervisor report.
- Consistent doctor history.

Build case methodically.
